shadcn2fluid_about-us.description: We build tools that help teams ship faster and collaborate better.
shadcn2fluid_about-us.content: Founded in 2019, our platform serves over 10,000 teams worldwide with intuitive project management and developer tooling.

shadcn2fluid_accordion.description: Everything you need to know about getting started.

items.title: How do I create a new project?
items.description: Click the + button in the sidebar to start a new project from scratch or use a template.

items.title: Can I invite team members?
items.description: Yes, go to Settings > Team and enter their email addresses to send invitations.

items.title: What integrations are available?
items.description: We support Slack, GitHub, GitLab, Jira, and over 50 other tools via our API.

items.title: Is there a free plan?
items.description: Our Starter plan is free forever for up to 3 users and 5 projects.

shadcn2fluid_alert.description: Our platform will undergo scheduled maintenance on Sunday from 2:00 AM to 4:00 AM UTC. Please save your work beforehand.

items.title: What payment methods do you accept?
items.description: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and wire transfers for annual plans.

items.title: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
items.description: Yes, you can cancel at any time. Your access continues until the end of the billing period.

items.title: Do you offer refunds?
items.description: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans.

items.title: Is my data portable?
items.description: You can export all your data at any time in CSV, JSON, or XML formats.

shadcn2fluid_about-company.description: A team of engineers, designers, and operators passionate about developer productivity.
shadcn2fluid_about-company.content: Founded in San Francisco in 2019, we started with a simple belief: deploying software should be as easy as pushing code. Today, we serve teams in over 120 countries.

shadcn2fluid_about-mission.description: To make every developer more productive by removing infrastructure complexity.
shadcn2fluid_about-mission.content: We believe that the best tools disappear into the background, letting you focus on what matters: building great software for your users.

shadcn2fluid_about-values.description: The principles that guide every decision we make.

items.title: Customer Obsession
items.description: Every feature starts with a real customer problem.

items.title: Intellectual Honesty
items.description: We follow the data, even when it's uncomfortable.

items.title: Default to Trust
items.description: We hire great people and give them autonomy.

items.title: Bias for Action
items.description: Ship early, iterate fast, learn continuously.

shadcn2fluid_author-bio.description: Alex has been building distributed systems for 12 years. Previously at Google and Netflix, now leading our core infrastructure team.

items.description: Two engineers frustrated with deployment complexity start building a better solution.

items.title: 2021 — Growth
items.description: Crossed 1,000 customers, raised Series B, expanded to 50 employees.
